'''âs-y-j''' ('''kasayaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neocolonise|neocolonise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neocolonise|neocolonise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-y-j
|-
! Lemma
| kasayaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisayaj|thisayaj]] || [[word:jisayaj|jisayaj]] || [[word:shisayaj|shisayaj]] || [[word:kisayaj|kisayaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusayaj|thuthusayaj]] || [[word:jujusayaj|jujusayaj]] || [[word:shushusayaj|shushusayaj]] || [[word:kukusayaj|kukusayaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusayaj|thusayaj]] || [[word:jusayaj|jusayaj]] || [[word:shusayaj|shusayaj]] || [[word:kusayaj|kusayaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusayaj|thusayaj]] || [[word:jusayaj|jusayaj]] || [[word:shusayaj|shusayaj]] || [[word:kusayaj|kusayaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesayaj|thesayaj]] || [[word:jesayaj|jesayaj]] || [[word:shesayaj|shesayaj]] || [[word:kesayaj|kesayaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosayaj|thothosayaj]] || [[word:jojosayaj|jojosayaj]] || [[word:shoshosayaj|shoshosayaj]] || [[word:kokosayaj|kokosayaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosayaj|thosayaj]] || [[word:josayaj|josayaj]] || [[word:shosayaj|shosayaj]] || [[word:kosayaj|kosayaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosayaj|thosayaj]] || [[word:josayaj|josayaj]] || [[word:shosayaj|shosayaj]] || [[word:kosayaj|kosayaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsayaj|thĂŠsayaj]] || [[word:jĂŠsayaj|jĂŠsayaj]] || [[word:shĂŠsayaj|shĂŠsayaj]] || [[word:kĂŠsayaj|kĂŠsayaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasayaj|thathasayaj]] || [[word:jajasayaj|jajasayaj]] || [[word:shashasayaj|shashasayaj]] || [[word:kakasayaj|kakasayaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasayaj|thasayaj]] || [[word:jasayaj|jasayaj]] || [[word:shasayaj|shasayaj]] || [[word:kasayaj|kasayaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasayaj|thasayaj]] || [[word:jasayaj|jasayaj]] || [[word:shasayaj|shasayaj]] || [[word:kasayaj|kasayaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasayaj|shasayaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasayaj|goshasayaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasayaj|gokishasayaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasayajnĂŒ|shasayajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasayajnknĂŒ|goshasayajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasayajnĂŒ|gokishasayajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasayajshĂ«|shasayajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasayajnkshĂ«|goshasayajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasayajshĂ«|gokishasayajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasayajro|shasayajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasayajnkro|goshasayajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasayajro|gokishasayajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasayajmu|shasayajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasayajnkmu|goshasayajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasayajmu|gokishasayajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasayajsher|shasayajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasayajnksher|goshasayajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasayajsher|gokishasayajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasayajng|shasayajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasayajnkng|goshasayajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasayajng|gokishasayajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasayajya|shasayajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasayajnkya|goshasayajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasayajya|gokishasayajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasayajyam|shasayajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasayajnkyam|goshasayajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasayajyam|gokishasayajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasayajnĂŒshĂ«|shasayajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasayajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasayajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasayajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasayajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasayajnĂŒro|shasayajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasayajnknĂŒro|goshasayajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasayajnĂŒro|gokishasayajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasayajnĂŒmu|shasayajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasayajnknĂŒmu|goshasayajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasayajnĂŒmu|gokishasayajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasayajshĂ«nĂŒ|shasayajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasayajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasayajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasayajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasayajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasayajshĂ«ro|shasayajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasayajnkshĂ«ro|goshasayajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasayajshĂ«ro|gokishasayajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasayajshĂ«mu|shasayajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasayajnkshĂ«mu|goshasayajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasayajshĂ«mu|gokishasayajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasayajronĂŒ|shasayajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasayajnkronĂŒ|goshasayajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasayajronĂŒ|gokishasayajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasayajroshĂ«|shasayajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasayajnkroshĂ«|goshasayajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasayajroshĂ«|gokishasayajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasayajromu|shasayajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasayajnkromu|goshasayajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasayajromu|gokishasayajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasayajmunĂŒ|shasayajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasayajnkmunĂŒ|goshasayajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasayajmunĂŒ|gokishasayajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasayajmushĂ«|shasayajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasayajnkmushĂ«|goshasayajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasayajmushĂ«|gokishasayajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasayajmuro|shasayajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasayajnkmuro|goshasayajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasayajmuro|gokishasayajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
